tagline: Enhance compute policy management without interrupting workloads.
what_it_does: This update allows workspace admins to schedule the enforcement of compute policy compliance for out-of-compliance all-purpose compute resources to occur at the next termination or restart, rather than immediately. This feature helps avoid disruptions to running workloads while ensuring compliance with defined policies. Admins can also cancel scheduled enforcements for individual compute resources or entire policies.
why_it_matters: By enabling deferred enforcement, organizations can maintain operational continuity and minimize downtime, which is crucial for productivity and cost management. This feature benefits workspace admins who need to ensure compliance without interrupting user activities, thus enhancing governance and reducing operational risks.
plain_summary: This update allows workspace admins to schedule the enforcement of compute policy compliance for out of compliance all purpose compute resources to occur at the next termination or restart, rather than immediately. This feature helps avoid disruptions to…

capabilities.title: Deferred Enforcement Scheduling
capabilities.desc: Admins can now schedule policy compliance updates to occur at the next compute restart.

capabilities.title: Immediate Enforcement Option
capabilities.desc: Admins can choose to apply policy updates immediately, restarting the compute resource.

capabilities.title: Cancellation of Scheduled Enforcement
capabilities.desc: Workspace admins can cancel pending enforcement for specific compute resources or entire policies.

capabilities.title: Compliance Monitoring
capabilities.desc: Admins can view compliance status and manage enforcement directly from the policy interface.

prerequisites: Workspace admin permissions are required to schedule or cancel deferred enforcement.
use_cases: Scheduling compliance updates during off-peak hours to minimize disruption.
Ensuring compliance for compute resources used in critical business applications.
Managing policy updates without interrupting ongoing data processing tasks.
limitations: Deferred enforcement is only applicable to all-purpose compute resources; jobs compute is enforced immediately.

steps.title: Access Policies
steps.desc: Navigate to the Policies tab under the Compute section in the Databricks workspace.

steps.title: Select Policy
steps.desc: Choose the policy you wish to enforce compliance for.

steps.title: Enforce Compliance
steps.desc: Click 'Enforce all' and select 'Enforce on next restart' to schedule the update.

steps.title: Monitor Compliance
steps.desc: Check the compliance status of compute resources in the policy overview.

steps.title: Cancel Enforcement if Needed
steps.desc: Use the kebab menu to cancel any scheduled enforcement for specific resources.

key_takeaway: The ability to schedule deferred policy enforcement enhances operational efficiency by allowing compliance updates without interrupting ongoing workloads.
